title: Adicea gnidioides
taxonomy: Adicea gnidioides is a species of flowering plant in the family Rhamnaceae. The plant is native to the Mediterranean region and has been classified as a member of the genus Adicea, which is part of the subfamily Ziziphoideae. Within the Rhamnaceae family, Adicea gnidioides is closely related to other species such as Ziziphus and Colubrina. The plant's classification has been further supported by molecular phylogenetic studies, which have confirmed its relationships to other members of the Rhamnaceae family. Adicea gnidioides is typically classified as a shrub or small tree, with a range of characteristics that distinguish it from other species in the genus.
